notes: Every frozen baseline row was reconciled against the current restaurant-issued PDF menus and restaurant-linked Toast ordering menu.
The current deduplicated catalog contains 182 menu items sourced from 286 rendered source rows across the active menus.
Only allergens directly named by item names or menu descriptions are retained as official ingredient signals.
The menus warn that not all ingredients are listed; empty arrays are classified unavailable and are not negative allergen claims.
The Toast menu is restaurant-linked vendor evidence and is not promoted to restaurant-issued authority.
The baseline generic PDF extraction collapsed menu sections, emitted headings and OCR fragments as items, and transferred adjacent-column allergen terms between rows.
The replacement snapshot preserves menu boundaries and only maps direct item-level ingredient terms using conservative plant-milk and nut-butter exclusions.

findings.summary: The baseline collapsed multiple current menus into 87 rows all labeled Breakfast, versus 182 current unique menu items across 28 sections.
findings.resolution: Replaced the collapsed baseline output with a reviewed, deduplicated snapshot preserving menu and section context.

findings.summary: Nineteen baseline rows had allergen mismatches caused primarily by adjacent-column/row bleed, truncation, or incomplete direct-term mapping.
findings.resolution: Rebuilt item-level allergen signals from direct text only and verified all 87 baseline dispositions.

findings.summary: The baseline contained 13 headings/modifiers/duplicates/OCR fragments and 12 stale ordering items.
findings.resolution: Removed non-items, deduplicated current rows, and omitted items absent from all current sources.

findings.summary: Restaurant menus disclose partial item descriptions and explicitly state that not all ingredients are listed.
findings.resolution: Classified 82 insufficiently disclosed items as allergen-data unavailable instead of treating silence as allergen-free.

repairs.summary: Prepared and targeted-tested a current 182-item replacement snapshot that removes extraction artifacts and preserves only direct allergen evidence.
verificationCommands: RESTAURANT_REPOSITORY_PATH=tmp/restaurant-verification/1310-repair-input.json node scripts/repair-final-generated-regressions.mjs (targeted copy; verified 182 items, 100 direct ingredient signals, 82 unavailable, 28 categories, zero known artifacts)
